ground_truth.title: Broad Ripple Pricing - The Yoga Studio
ground_truth.main_content: New Member Intro Offers: 2 weeks unlimited for $35. This package is for NEW STUDENTS only. One/person. All unlimited memberships will automatically reset the start date with your first visit. All purchases are non-refundable. Expires 14 days from the date of first redemption. Membership Options: All memberships can be used at both locations. Auto-Renewal Month Unlimited for $130/month with a 3 month commitment. Benefits include 10% off products and workshops plus one complimentary guest pass per month. one month unlimited for $155 with 30 day expiration. one month unlimited - 25 and under for $105 with promo code MONTH105. Class Packs: All class packs can be used at both locations. Single Class for $25. 5 Pack for $60, expires 3 months from purchase. 10 Pack for $160, 3 month expiration from the date of purchase. 25 Pack for $350, 6 month expiration. 50 Pack for $600, 1 year expiration. 1 Workshop for $35. Discounts Available: Discounts may not be used on intro offers or combined with any other promotions. Student Discount: $12 Walk-In, Ages 16-22, Parent Consent for ages 16-17, Promo Code: Student12. Senior Discount: $12 Walk-In, 65 years and older, Promo Code: Senior12. Military Discount: $12 Walk-In, Promo Code: Miltary12. EXPRESS WALK IN: $12, Expires 30 days from purchase, Only for 45-minute express classes. OFF-PEAK WALK IN: $12, Expires 30 days from purchase, 11:30 am and 4:30 pm classes Mon - Fri ONLY. All single class and package purchases are non-refundable and there are no extensions on packages after the expiration date. Exceptions made only for Medical Reasons.
with: This package is for NEW STUDENTS only. One/person.
I hereby authorized The Yoga Studio, LLC to debit my credit card $130/month.
All memberships can be used at both locations.
Discounts may not be used on intro offers or combined with any other promotions.
